sectionSubtitle: Eight curated categories — organized to help you find exactly what your Heady deployment needs, whether you're building from scratch or extending an existing setup.

categories.name: AI Agents
categories.description: Pre-configured AI agents mapped to the seven Heady cognitive archetypes — Owl, Eagle, Dolphin, Rabbit, Ant, Elephant, and Beaver. Each agent is domain-specialized, pre-trained on relevant knowledge, and ready to deploy into your 17-Swarm Matrix. Agents range from customer support companions to code review specialists, legal research assistants to marketing strategists.

categories.name: Workflow Templates
categories.description: Production-ready HeadyFlow workflow templates for common business processes — lead qualification pipelines, content generation workflows, data enrichment automations, incident response runbooks, and more. Each template is peer-reviewed, documented with setup instructions, and versioned with the HeadyFlow runtime it targets.

categories.name: MCP Servers
categories.description: Model Context Protocol server packages that connect Heady agents to external tools, APIs, and data sources — CRMs, databases, SaaS platforms, internal tools, and data warehouses. Install an MCP server and your agents immediately gain access to new capabilities: querying Salesforce records, reading from Snowflake, triggering GitHub Actions, or pulling from custom REST APIs.

categories.name: UI Components
categories.description: React and Web Component UI elements designed to integrate with HeadyWeb's micro-frontend architecture — AI chat widgets, data visualization panels, agent status dashboards, workflow progress trackers, and custom interaction components. All components follow the Heady design system and support white-label theming via CSS custom properties.

categories.name: Data Connectors
categories.description: Pre-built data ingestion connectors that pipe external data sources into the Heady 3D vector memory system — web scrapers, document parsers, database sync adapters, API pollers, and streaming data feeds. Connectors include built-in rate limiting, retry logic, and φ-scaled scheduling for optimal ingestion pacing.

categories.name: Skills & Tools
categories.description: Granular skill packages that extend individual agent capabilities — domain-specific knowledge modules, specialized reasoning patterns, custom CSL gate configurations, and tool-use behaviors. Skills are the atomic unit of the HeadyStore ecosystem: small, focused, composable, and easily combined to build complex agent behaviors without starting from scratch.

categories.name: Industry Packs
categories.description: Vertically curated bundles of agents, templates, MCP servers, and data connectors pre-assembled for specific industries. Each Industry Pack is reviewed by domain experts, tested in production environments, and includes documentation for common use cases within that vertical. Available for Legal, Healthcare, Financial Services, eCommerce, Real Estate, and Manufacturing.

categories.name: Starter Kits
categories.description: Complete get-started packages for developers and businesses new to the Heady ecosystem — everything you need to have a production-grade Heady deployment running in under an hour. Starter Kits include preconfigured agents, sample workflows, documentation, and a setup wizard that walks through configuration. Perfect for evaluators, hackathon participants, and rapid prototypers.
